executive_summary: Multiple critical vulnerabilities are being actively exploited in the wild, including Fortinet FortiClient EMS (CVE-2023-48788), F5 BIG-IP (upgraded from DoS to critical RCE), and Citrix NetScaler (CVE-2026-3055) which is under active reconnaissance just hours after disclosure. The European Commission confirmed a data breach after hackers breached their cloud infrastructure, with threat actor ShinyHunters allegedly involved. Russian APT Star Blizzard (TA446) has adopted the DarkSword iOS exploit kit to target iPhone users via phishing. TeamPCP supply chain attacks continue to expand, now targeting Telnyx and allegedly Databricks platforms through backdoored Python SDKs.

canada_landscape.summary: No direct cyberattacks on Canadian organizations were reported in this 48-hour period. Two articles discuss smart home security guidance gaps that include Canadian context, noting that government guidance is insufficient for smart home breach recovery. No CCCS advisories were published during this timeframe.

report_2w.executive_summary: CISA has added two critical vulnerabilities to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog—Aquasecurity Trivy (CVE-2026-33634) and Langflow (CVE-2026-33017)—both actively exploited within hours of disclosure. A major supply chain attack by the TeamPCP threat actor compromised the Telnyx Python package (742,000 downloads), delivering malware to AI developers. Iran-linked hackers from the Handala group claim to have breached FBI Director Kash Patel's personal email account. Canada-specific threats include a ransomware claim against GeoMechanics Technologies by the Akira group, though no major retail or financial institution breaches were reported.

canada_landscape.summary: The Canadian cybersecurity landscape this period features a ransomware claim by Akira against GeoMechanics Technologies, marking the only direct Canada-targeted cyber incident. No CCCS advisories were published during this reporting period. Canadian organizations should remain vigilant regarding the actively exploited Trivy and Langflow vulnerabilities, as well as the widespread TeamPCP supply chain campaign.
